summary: Tested Guardião Família parental control app (monochrome PT). Backend: 15/15 pytest tests pass covering children, dashboard, locations, geofences (incl. create/delete with GET verification), apps (incl. block toggle + persistence), screen-time (incl. limit update + persistence), alerts (incl. mark-read + read-all), and /seed reset. Frontend: landing page renders with 'Guardião' brand and enter-app-btn; enter navigates to Dashboard (tabs). Dashboard shows child info, screen time, last location, stats grid (apps/blocked/alerts). Child switcher (Sofia/Lucas) switches context across all tabs correctly - data updates live (screen time 4h35m → 7h20m, battery 78% → 45%, device iPhone13 → Samsung A54). Location tab: map mock, add-geofence-btn, zonas list (Casa 150m, Escola 200m). Apps tab: usage summary, category filters (filter-todos/video/social/jogos/educ), 6 block-switch rows - toggling persists via PATCH. Alerts tab: tab-all/tab-unread filter, read-all-btn, alert cards. Settings tab: profile card, limit-minus/limit-plus (30min increments, persists), logout-btn. All testIDs from spec found and functional.

issues: Block switches render with default teal/green active color (seen on TikTok row) which violates the strict black-and-white monochrome design requirement. Consider custom Switch with trackColor/thumbColor set to black/white/grey.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '[Layout children]: Too many screens defined. Route (tabs) is extraneous. Route child/[id] is extraneous.' - redundant Stack.Screen declarations in _layout.tsx; Expo Router auto-detects file-based routes.
Warning: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.'

action_items: (Optional) Make Apps block-switch monochrome (custom trackColor/thumbColor) to match strict B&W theme.
(Optional) Clean up extraneous Stack.Screen declarations in app/_layout.tsx for (tabs) and child/[id] to remove warnings.
(Optional) Replace deprecated Image style.resizeMode / props.pointerEvents usages.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single-file 367 LOC module - fine for this size but future growth should split routers per resource.
MongoDB _id properly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} throughout - good.
find_one_and_update with return_document=True returns updated doc but _id is then popped - OK, though projection would be cleaner.
seed_if_empty only seeds when children count == 0 - idempotent on restart; /api/seed endpoint correctly wipes and reseeds.
seed_data_creation: None created. Used built-in /api/seed to reset demo data. Test-created geofence was cleaned up in the same test (create→verify→delete→verify).
context_for_next_testing_agent: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://access-guard-26.preview.emergentagent.com serves both Expo web (root) and FastAPI (/api). Backend auto-seeds 2 children (Sofia, Lucas). Tab navigation via bottom tab bar - use page.get_by_text('<PT label>').last or click testID-equipped tab items. No auth.
